CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2025 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-14-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-29-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-14-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-15-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JOSEPH PELLERITI's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions.

Plaintiff Joseph Pelleriti's unopposed Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions is GRANTED.

The motion is granted as to Request for Production of Documents, Set One, Nos. 25, 26 and 32. The requests are reasonably calculated to lead to the discovery of admissible evidence. (Code of Civil Procedure Section 2017.010.) Plaintiff has shown Defendant's' responses are evasive/incomplete. Defendants have not demonstrated that any objection has merit. Plaintiffs' meet and confer was reasonable. The court orders Defendant to provide further verified production no later than 10 court days from notice of this order. Documents for which Defendant is asserting a privilege must be identified in a Code compliant privilege log. Further responses, verification (if not yet provided) and privilege log due at the same time.

Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. Plaintiff failed to request sanctions (let alone name the party from whom they were sought or the amount sought) in the text of the notice of motion as required by Code of Civil Procedure section 2023.040.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and drop a hard paper copy in Dept. 302's inbox for the court's review and signature.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-17-2024 Set For Trial On May-27-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
